bead.title: tests: add hermetic provider-discovery guard for the cmd suite
bead.description:
PROBLEM
During ddx-0be85773 dogfood on 2026-06-13, `go test ./cmd/...` spawned real provider CLI children and repeatedly read `/home/erik/.cache/fizeau/discovery/*-subscription.refreshing`. There is no cmd-test-wide guard that forces Fizeau discovery/cache paths into a temp root or blocks real provider CLI lookup, so discovery falls through to the operator's real cache and live auth paths. Tests must be hermetic.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
cli/cmd/testutils_test.go and cli/cmd/run_test_helpers_test.go set some hermetic env but do NOT redirect the Fizeau discovery/cache directories into the per-test temp root, and do NOT rewrite PATH so codex/claude/gemini resolve to fake binaries. Discovery therefore falls through to the real ~/.cache/fizeau/discovery and resolves real provider CLIs found on PATH.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add a shared cmd-test helper that, for each test: (a) points HOME/XDG_CACHE_HOME and the Fizeau discovery+cache env at a per-test t.TempDir(); (b) rewrites PATH so codex/claude/gemini resolve only to harmless fake binaries; (c) disables subscription refresh/network calls in tests.
- Wire this helper into the existing setup in cli/cmd/testutils_test.go and cli/cmd/run_test_helpers_test.go so it applies suite-wide.

NON-SCOPE
Do not weaken production provider discovery. Do not skip the affected tests. Do not kill unrelated interactive provider sessions as part of test cleanup. Process-leak assertion and the zero-config/underspecified-routing test rewrites are handled in sibling beads.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestProviderDiscoveryGuard_RedirectsCacheToTempRoot asserts the guard sets the Fizeau discovery/cache env under t.TempDir() and that the cmd suite does not read from the real ~/.cache/fizeau/discovery.
2. TestProviderDiscoveryGuard_FakeProviderCLIsOnPath asserts the guard rewrites PATH so codex, claude, and gemini resolve only to fake binaries, not real provider CLIs.
3. With the guard active, `cd cli && go test ./cmd/...` no longer reads or loops on `/home/*/.cache/fizeau/discovery/*.refreshing`.
4. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... -run 'TestProviderDiscoveryGuard_RedirectsCacheToTempRoot|TestProviderDiscoveryGuard_FakeProviderCLIsOnPath'` passes.
5. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/...` green.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
